messages.content: You are a helpful assistant that summarizes text concisely.

Summarize the following: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that focuses on building systems that learn from data. Rather than being explicitly programmed, these systems improve through experience. Common approaches include supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and reinforcement learning. Deep learning, a subfield of machine learning, uses neural networks with multiple layers to model complex patterns in data.
